creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On Wed, 21 Aug 2013 23:10:28 +0200
lbartoletti <coder@tuxfamily.org> wrote:

> Hello,
> 
> You can find a patch with some other options added.
> 
> Tinderlog :
> https://redports.org/~lbartoletti/20130821204501-64763-139658/gdal-1.10.0.log
> 
> Regards

Hello,

I just found out that your patch didn't resolv my problems and the
error is still sticky (and present).

But I found out, that the option "PGSQL", which allows the use of
PostgreSQL, triggers the problem!

I use both PostgreSQL 9.2 client and server frm the ports (on all
FreeBSD 9.2/10.0 boxes). Maybe this gives a further hint where to look
for the malfunction.

I had to disable the option PGSQL in order to proceed. Without it, the
port compiles on the boxes in question as expected.

Regards,
Oliver
